RAMSLAB Research on Advanced Mechanical Systems

Imagine, Build, Automate: Pioneering the Next Era of Industrial Robotics and Simulation

ProjectsPeoplePublicationsNewsConsortiumAssistantAbout
University of Pavia
Assistant

Assistant

Local RAMSLAB assistant connected to a self-hosted language model. Responses are grounded on the current website archive and intended for research, archive, and institutional queries.

local model bridge required on the same machine or network
Endpoint
http://127.0.0.1:8787/api/chat
Scope
Projects, people, publications, news, and institutional details currently present in the RAMSLAB archive.
Usage
Ask in Italian or English. The assistant should distinguish RAMSLAB-grounded answers from general knowledge.
System
The local assistant is ready. Start with a question about the RAMSLAB archive, laboratory profile, or current site content.
Idle
Department
Department of Industrial and Information Engineering
ai.rams@unipv.it
